01-deadline-day-jitters.html.excerpt: The Dow fell 85 points while the S&P and Russell 2000 rose. When indices diverge like this, it's not a rally. It's a rotation.

02-williams-watchful-waiting.html.excerpt: NY Fed President John Williams just signaled 'watchful waiting.' Here's what every phrase in the speech means for the April 29 FOMC decision.

03-earnings-kickoff-playbook.html.excerpt: Delta reports Wednesday, CPI drops Thursday, banks hit next Tuesday. Three catalyst days in four sessions. Your positioning guide is here.

04-consumer-credit.html.excerpt: February revolving credit grew just 0.6% annualized. When credit card spending slows this hard, a Q2 retail earnings miss is already in motion.

05-tesla-jpm-warning.html.excerpt: JPMorgan just published a note warning Tesla could fall 60%. When a tier-1 bank puts that in writing, it's not a headline. It's a signal.

06-energy-ceasefire-cliff.html.excerpt: XOM, CVX, and OXY are priced for war, not peace. A ceasefire this week gaps oil to $94 and these stocks with it. Here's how to stress test.
